title: TIE crawler
content:
{{Top}} {{GroundVehicle |image=[[File:TIE-crawler-CYD.png]] |name=TIE crawler |designer= |manufacturer=[[Sienar Fleet Systems]]''[[Ultimate Star Wars]]'' |line=[[TIE series|TIE fighter series]]''[[Choose Your Destiny: A Luke & Leia Adventure]]'' |model=TIE crawler |type=[[Tank]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |speed= |velocity= |engine= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role= |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire]] *[[Tech Masters]] {{C|stolen}} }} {{Quote|What have we here, Everson?''"
"''The prisoner attempted to steal a century tank, Lord Craykan.|[[Craykan]] and [[Everson]]|}} The '''TIE crawler''', or '''century tank''', was a model of [[tank]] that resembled a [[TIE series|TIE]] [[starfighter]] [[cockpit]] suspended between two tank treads. It was used to climb a tall hill of debris. The treads could rotate leaving the cockpit on the rear end of the craft. This allowed for crawling over different terrains. {{Veh-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Choose Your Destiny: A Luke & Leia Adventure]]'' {{Ab|Choose Your Destiny: A Luke & Leia Adventure (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Oruga TIE |uk=Танк «Століття» }} [[Category:Crawler and wheeled vehicle models]] [[Category:Tank models]] [[Category:TIE series models|Crawler]] [[Category:Vehicle classes of the Galactic Empire]]
